description: All rails grouped by power state (sleep domain). G3H = always present with AC, AON = always on with battery, S2-S0 = progressively more awake. M3 generation uses AWAKE naming. WiFi module is Willamette. USB-C retimers are MACAW (UF600/UF650). MagSafe controller is ACE3 (U5900). Audio uses 6x TAWANG amplifiers. SPMU unused LDOs: 6, 15, 17, 16 (NC). MPMU unused LDOs: 1, 3, 5, 14, 18 (NC). Leader/Follower PMU terminology used for thermal sensors. PP5V_S2 camera filter uses PP5V_S2 input (LP410).

domains.name: G3H
domains.description: Present whenever AC power is connected (pre-charger, pre-battery). Wake condition: USB-C or MagSafe cable inserted.
domains.pmu: Port controllers (UF400 ATC0, UF500 ATC1, U5900 ACE3 MagSafe)

domains.name: AON
domains.description: Always on when battery or charger connected. Stays up in all sleep states. Wake condition: PPBUS_AON present (battery connected or charger active).
domains.pmu: U5700 (SVR AON 30A), U7700 (SPMU LDO 9/9B/LDOINT), U8100 (MPMU LDO 2/9/9B/LDOINT)

domains.name: S2
domains.description: System sleep / standby. Memory retention active. Most peripherals off. Wake condition: PMU enable signals from AON domain. P5VS2_PWR_EN, EDP_PANEL_PWR_EN asserted.
domains.pmu: UC300 (5V S2), UC710 (3V3 S2), U8100 (MPMU BUCK 3/4/13, LDO 7/10/11/20), U7700 (SPMU BUCK 14, LDO 4), load switches (UC630/UC840/UC850/UC820)

domains.name: S1
domains.description: Light sleep. Core SoC domains retained at low voltage. Wake condition: S2 domain active + SoC sleep state controller asserts S1 enables.

domains.name: AWAKE
domains.description: Fully awake. SoC running, display on, all dynamic domains active. Wake condition: PMU_ACTIVE_READY asserted. All S2/S1 rails stable.
domains.pmu: U8100 (MPMU BUCK 0/1/7/11/13 SW1/SW3, LDO 8), U7700 (SPMU BUCK 6/8/12/13 SW4/SW5/SW6/SW7), LP800 (BEN), San Diego Display PMU
